title: Vacation of office of Prime Minister and Minister

content.text: The office of the Prime Minister shall be vacant in any of the following circumstances:

subclauses.text: if he or she tenders resignation in writing to the President,
if a vote of confidence is not passed or a vote of no-confidence is passed against him or her under Article 100,
if he or she ceases to be a member of the House of Representatives,

content.text: The office of a Minister shall be vacant in any of the following circumstances:

subclauses.text: if he or she tenders resignation in writing to the Prime Minister,
if the Prime Minister removes him or her from office,
if the office of Prime Minister falls vacant under sub-clause

content.text: If the office of Prime Minister falls vacant under clause

, the same Council of Ministers shall continue to act until another Council of Ministers is constituted. Provided that if the Prime Minister dies, the senior-most Minister shall act as the Prime Minister until a new Prime Minister is appointed.
